# regressions

Golden conversion cases under this subsystem.

| Case | Direction | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| [bad-duration](bad-duration.md) | `from` | Invalid duration values emit error diagnostics |
| [bad-seconds-duration](bad-seconds-duration.md) | `from` | Invalid seconds duration values emit error diagnostics via secondsDurationPtr |
| [empty-quantity](empty-quantity.md) | `from` | Empty quantity string is ignored (parseQuantityPtr nil path) |
| [unknown-key-warn](unknown-key-warn.md) | `from` | Unhandled ConfigMap keys emit warn diagnostics and are dropped |
